scripts.dev: concurrently --names api,app,landing,orchestrator --success first "bun run --filter @unveiled/api dev" "bun run --filter @unveiled/app dev" "bun run --filter @unveiled/landing dev" "bun run --filter @unveiled/orchestrator dev"
scripts.predev: bun run --filter '@unveiled/api' build && bun run --filter '@unveiled/orchestrator' build
scripts.build: bun run ladle:build && bun run --filter '@unveiled/landing' build && bun run --filter '@unveiled/app' build
scripts.preview:cloudflare: bun run --filter '@unveiled/api' build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.api.toml --remote & PID_API=$!; bun run --filter @unveiled/app build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.app.toml --remote & PID_APP=$!; bun run --filter @unveiled/landing build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.landing.toml --remote & PID_LANDING=$!; bun run --filter @unveiled/orchestrator build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.orchestrator.toml --remote; kill $PID_API $PID_APP $PID_LANDING
scripts.preview:cloudflare:api: bun run --filter '@unveiled/api' build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.api.toml --remote
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: bun run --filter '@unveiled/api' build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.api.toml && bun run --filter @unveiled/app build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.app.toml && bun run --filter @unveiled/landing build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.landing.toml && bun run --filter @unveiled/orchestrator build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.orchestrator.toml
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:api: bun run --filter '@unveiled/api' build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.api.toml
scripts.check: bun run check:i18n-coverage && bun run --filter '@unveiled/app' astro-check-proxied && bun run --filter '@unveiled/landing' astro-check-proxied && biome check . && bun run specs:check && bun run tokens:check && bun run ladle:coverage && bun run --filter '@unveiled/design-system' check:atomic-layers && bun run check:styling-ownership && bun run wrangler:check-env
scripts.specs:gen: tsp compile typespec/main.tsp && bun run scripts/specs-gen.ts && bun run --filter '@unveiled/api' openapi:gen
scripts.specs:check: bun run scripts/specs-check.ts && bun run --filter '@unveiled/api' openapi:check
scripts.check:heroui-replica: bun run ladle:coverage && bun run check
